title: Creative Music Updated
description: The 6 creative exclusive songs by C418 now play in the overworld (excluding caves).
body:
Plays the 6 creative exclusive songs by C418 in all overworld biomes (excluding caves).

The songs are:
- Taswell - C418
- Dreiton - C418
- Aria Math - C418
- Biome Fest - C418
- Blind Spots - C418
- Haunt Muskie - C418

Should work with all Mods as the Resource Pack doesn't overwrite anything.
